We purchased and unlocked all doors on 2 separate Oculus gos. Haven’t been on for a while and now all doors are locked. My family really enjoyed face your fears and now we feel scammed out of something we paid for. If it’s a bug, it needs to be fixed ASAP! Very disappointed

Why all rooms are locked? 
This is scam! dont purchase for nothing

reviews.review_title: Purchased but doors are still locked
reviews.review_description:
May I have my door back please? 

I am so late to this, I hadn't been on my Go in a while because I had started playing on the Quest 2.  However, I often go back to the Go when I miss the better games.  Also my controller wouldn't pair to my headset on my Go.  After doing a factory reset I found that the doors to this in-App game along with every game that I've ever purchased on the Oculus Go has been locked.  It shows that I have purchased them on the Oculus app on my phone, but when I click to launch the game on the headset, they were still locked and also they are not available to restore on my account.

Ok everyone, after getting the runaround for a week, I have discovered, if you have purchased any games for the Oculus Go, then you are OUT OF YOUR MONEY AND OUT OF LUCK!  The Go has become obsolete, the support staff has no clue on how to fix it and the developers have jumped ship.  We will not be able to play the extra doors to this game or any of the other in-app games from the Go and we will not be  able to re-purchase them at all.  The store tab on the headset is not available. 

Don't even expect any help from support, unless your ready to do a factory reset for each support rep that you CHAT with.  I did 5 factory resets until I found out that there is nothing that can be done.  Even one of the most expensive games that I had  purchased for both the Go and the Quest 2 have been removed.

This is very disappointing and I have no confidence in this company what-so-ever.
How do I get my in-app purchases restored?
